prompt: Implement TopModule in TopModule.sv. Its ports are input clk, input reset, and output logic [3:0] q. It is a decade counter that counts 1 through 10 inclusive. All state changes occur on the positive edge of clk. reset is active-high and synchronous and sets q to 1. After q reaches 10, the next active clock edge wraps it to 1.
instruction: Write the complete synthesizable SystemVerilog implementation in TopModule.sv.
